data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for follow-up reminders for non-signers.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Follow-up reminders for non-signers' as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of follow-up reminders for non-signers. The linked use case mentions the need for these reminders, but without any supporting evidence or endpoints to confirm their existence, the requirement is deemed unmet.
gaps: No evidence of follow-up reminders for non-signers functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
